query_spec.intent: Identify the longest linear citation chain among the provided papers where each paper cites the previous one in the sequence.
query_spec.selector: doc must cite another provided doc (to be the successor) or be cited by another provided doc (to be the predecessor) to form a continuous chain.

projector.ref_unit_justification: Instruction requirement 1 states: 'Please present the titles of the papers in the form of a list'.

doc_records.verdict_reason: Evidence shows DOC1 cites 'Contrastive semi-supervised learning for asr' (DOC2), making DOC1 the predecessor to DOC2 in the chain.
doc_records.ref_value: HuBERT: Self-Supervised Speech Representation Learning by Masked Prediction of Hidden Units
doc_records.facts: DOC1 contains a citation to 'Contrastive semi-supervised learning for asr' (arXiv:2103.05149), which corresponds to DOC2. This establishes the link DOC1 -> DOC2.

outgoing_refs.quote: A. Xiao, C. Fuegen, and A. Mohamed, 'Contrastive semi-supervised learning for asr,' arXiv preprint arXiv:2103.05149, 2021.

doc_records.verdict_reason: Evidence shows DOC2 cites 'HuBERT: How much can a bad teacher benefit ASR pre-training?' which is a variant title for DOC1, making DOC2 the successor to DOC1.
doc_records.facts: DOC2 cites 'HuBERT: How much can a bad teacher benefit ASR pre-training?' (ICASSP, 2021). While the title in the citation differs slightly from the input title of DOC1 ('HuBERT: Self-Supervised Speech Representation Learning...'), the authors (Hsu, Tsai, Bolte, Salakhutdinov, Mohamed) and the subject (HuBERT) confirm it refers to the work in DOC1. This establishes the link DOC2 -> DOC1.

outgoing_refs.quote: Wei-Ning Hsu, Yao-Hung Hubert Tsai, Benjamin Bolte, Ruslan Salakhutdinov, and Abdelrahman Mohamed, "HuBERT: How much can a bad teacher benefit ASR pre-training?" ICASSP, 2021.

doc_records.verdict_reason: Evidence shows DOC3 cites 'Hubert: Self-supervised speech representation learning by masked prediction of hidden units' (DOC1), making DOC3 a successor to DOC1.
doc_records.ref_value: SUPERB: Speech processing Universal PERformance Benchmark
doc_records.facts: DOC3 cites 'Hubert: Self-supervised speech representation learning by masked prediction of hidden units' (arXiv:2106.07447), which matches the title of DOC1. This establishes the link DOC3 -> DOC1.

outgoing_refs.quote: W.-N. Hsu, B. Bolte, Y.-H. H. Tsai, K. Lakhotia, R. Salakhutdinov, and A. Mohamed, "Hubert: Self-supervised speech representation learning by masked prediction of hidden units," arXiv preprint arXiv:2106.07447, 2021.

structure.summary: The structure is a fan-in where DOC1 is the central node cited by both DOC2 and DOC3, but DOC1 also cites DOC2, creating a cycle (DOC1->DOC2->DOC1) and a separate branch (DOC3->DOC1). The longest linear chain without cycles is DOC3 -> DOC1 -> DOC2.

completeness.expected_hint: Instruction asks for 'the longest citation chain' and 'linear and continuous'.

filled_skeleton: SUPERB: Speech processing Universal PERformance Benchmark
